arts.ttl: Newcastle United coaching masterclass pays off with bargain buy - and Eddie Howe knows it - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: The 20-year-old was used by Chelsea in midfield, as a left winger and sometimes in the centre of the engine room, but Newcastle boss Howe and his coaching staff tirelessly worked with him last season on the training pitch to perfect his defensive game. Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe has hailed the transformation of Lewis Hall from rookie signing to the Magpies' first choice left-back.

arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali AC Milan transfer truth clear as Newcastle shown £18.1m reality
arts.sum: Reports from Italy in recent months have speculated that a return to his homeland could be on the cards for the Magpies No.8, with Milan, Juventus and Manchester United rumoured to be interested in the player. Tonali recently had an interview in Italy where he spoke about the rumours concerning his future at Newcastle making it clear he does not want to leave St. James' Park.

arts.ttl: Striker Arsenal sold for less than £10m last summer now has more goals than Alexander Isak this season
arts.sum: Arsenal have seen their Premier League title hopes fizzle out amid an injury crisis up front this season. The Gunners are without Bukayo Saka, Gabriel...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make Newcastle United FA Cup admission after sealing quarter-final spot
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has insisted that Newcastle United are more likely to win the FA Cup than his side despite them having already booked their place in the quarter-finals of the competition. Our award-winning The Everything is Black and White Podcast is the go-to Newcastle United show to bring you all the latest news, opinion, analysis and nostalgia about the club.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United cult hero 'in talks' to join club in tier 10 after ambitious chairman's phonecall
arts.sum: Twitch streamer Aaron Hunt, who was recently announced as chairman of North West Counties Football League side Daisy Hill FC, has revealed surprising talks with former Newcastle United striker Papiss Demba Cisse over signing for the club. "I spoke to Papiss Cisse about potentially coming in," the internet personality - who sensationally took over running of The Cutters last month having successfully run the club virtually on live streams of Football Manager - announced whilst live during their latest fixture against Atherton.

arts.ttl: 'Charisma' - Loris Karius hailed as ex-Newcastle United goalkeeper makes triumphant return - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: The 31-year-old joined Schalke in January, after six months without a club, and had been second choice to Justin Heekeren until Friday night’s match, when he made his first appearance in German football since 2021 when playing for Union Berlin. The former Newcastle United and Liverpool goalkeeper was handed a rare start but shone between the posts for Schalke in their 1-0 win over Preussen Munster in 2.

arts.ttl: Journalist insists player is ‘on Brighton’s radar’ – He may need convincing of transfer
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion are interested in Twente midfielder Sem Steijn but may struggle to convince him to move to England. That’s according to journalists Tijmen van Wissing and Bert van Losser, relayed by Twente Insite, who has revealed Brighton are watching the 23-year-old. arts.ttl: Alexander Isak 'would snub' Newcastle United No.9 shirt as striker future to be decided in summer
arts.sum: It is an iconic shirt, with Shearer in particular making it his own with 206 goals for the club as he became the Premier League and Newcastle's all-time leading scorer. The super Swede, who arrived in a club-record £63million move from Real Sociedad in August 2022, has bagged 19 goals in 24 Premier League games this term.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United stadium cost truth with £1.2bn blueprint working wonders at Premier League rival
arts.sum: Recent reports suggest a new, city centre venue could cost Newcastle over £1.2bn to build. The Deloitte Money League recently revealed the Magpies had increased their total annual revenue from £250m to £314m, with more potentially awaiting further down the tracks with a plush new stadium that can act as more than a football venue.

arts.ttl: Manchester United rival Tottenham, Newcastle & Villa for transfer of potential free agent
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is reportedly keen for the club to seal the transfer return of Angel Gomes as he becomes a free agent this summer.
